TestCase.name: testKeepsNonRedundantGroupKeys
TestCase.Resource: select deptno, job, count(*) as c from emp group by deptno, job
LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}], C=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(DEPTNO=[$7], JOB=[$2]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testRemoveMultipleRedundantGroupKeys
TestCase.Resource: select empno, ename, job, count(*) as c from emp group by empno, ename, job
LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1, 2}], C=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(EMPNO=[$0], ENAME=[$1], JOB=[$2]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])
LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], ENAME=[ANY_VALUE($1)], JOB=[ANY_VALUE($2)], C=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(EMPNO=[$0], ENAME=[$1], JOB=[$2]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testRemoveOneRedundantGroupKey
TestCase.Resource: select deptno, name, count(*) as c from sales.dept group by deptno, name
LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], NAME=[ANY_VALUE($1)], C=[COUNT()]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, DEPT]])

TestCase.name: testRemoveRedundantComputedGroupKey
TestCase.Resource: select deptno, deptno + 2 from emp group by deptno, deptno + 2
LogicalAggregate(group=[{0, 1}]) LogicalProject(DEPTNO=[$7], EXPR$1=[+($7, 2)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])
LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], EXPR$1=[ANY_VALUE($1)]) LogicalProject(DEPTNO=[$7], EXPR$1=[+($7, 2)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])
